CustomField.description: The exact label string used in NEPA_Permit_Matrix__mdt Required_Permits__c semicolon lists. NEPA_Permit_Record_Creator splits those strings on semicolons and queries this field to find the matching catalog record. Must match exactly — case-sensitive.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Exact permit label as it appears in NEPA_Permit_Matrix Required_Permits__c (e.g., "CWA Section 404 Permit").
CustomField.label: Canonical Name
